title: Oxide
body:
Ashes to Ashes, Rust to Rust.
# What's Oxide? Oxide brings rust and ruin to your world. Unlike other building mods, Oxide's blocks are not static--they rust and decay from the passage of time and the ravages of the world around you. Your beautiful factory will mark its age as slowly, the paint peels off the sheet metal and the heavy chains grow red and tarnished. Buildings built in dry environments will not suffer the ravishes of rain, whereas buildings built next to the ocean will succumb much faster. Oxide adds novel ways to build as well. Cement is a beautiful, modern material only obtainable in its pure form by pouring it into casts you make, with the ability to place rebar before you pour to ensure its stability, and the versatile Sprayer lets you varnish, paint, and rust blocks at a distance. ![vine divider by The Bobbu stating "features"](https://i.imgur.com/YnRxEo4.png) **New Iron Blocks** - Corrugated Iron - Cut Iron - Iron Scaffold - Iron Pillar - Heavy Iron Trapdoor, Door, Bars - Wrought Iron Fences, Fence Gates **Cement** - Cement - Cement Pouring - Rebar - Block of Cement - Cinder Blocks **Bricks** - Cinder Bricks - Clinker Bricks - Stock Bricks - Cream Bricks **Sprayer** - Craft a sprayer with water, dye (with water), honey, lava, or milk, and spray away! Dye paints, water rusts, honey varnishes/waxes, lava burns, and milk cures. **And More?** - Secrets!! Wink!! *NOTE: Vanilla iron blocks are untouched by rusting--only Oxide brand blocks rust.* ![Vine divider stating "CREDITS"](https://i.imgur.com/gpC2puj.png) - [Keyberries](https://modrinth.com/user/keyberries) for the mod's textures. - [Ordana](https://modrinth.com/user/Ordana) for code, idea, and implementation. - [The Bobbu](https://modrinth.com/user/Bobisnotaperson) for the icon, banner, and dividers. - [MehVahdJukaar](https://modrinth.com/user/MehVahdJukaar) for invaluable code advice. - [eldabys](https://modrinth.com/user/eldabys5) for project management and toad wrangling. ![A twisting gray-blue vine divider made by The Bobbu.](https://i.imgur.com/g3DorAO.png) Please include in modpacks! if you do you can talk about it on our [Discord](https://discord.gg/uTAt8RXdtr). #### Oxide is best paired with: [**![Would](https://i.imgur.com/YdPkWIv.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/would "Would") [**![Verdant](https://i.imgur.com/GiUOrEz.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/verdant-mod "Verdant") [**![Grounded](https://i.imgur.com/2RZegG8.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/grounded "Grounded") [**![Oxide](https://i.imgur.com/dFua2iK.png)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/verdant-mod "Oxide")
